name: lukaisu
description: Lukaisu — a mobile client for self-hosted LWT (Learning with Texts) servers

scripts.sync: npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.sync:model-b: npm run build:webapp && npm run pull:webapp && cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug:model-b: npm run sync:model-b && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
